name: Solana
fullText:
"If you ask kids, only 10% of them have seen the Milky Way."

A teacher giving a daytime astronomy class can connect to a telescope on the other side of the world where it's dark and observe the stars live through @Skymapperspace, a global telescope network on Solana. https://t.co/f0BIbsjeIr
